name: openclaw-capital-radar
description: OpenClaw Capital Radar - live investing blueprint and market landscape report.

scripts.build: node validate-report.cjs data/report-state.sample.json && node scripts/build-current-review.cjs && node scripts/seed-agent-notes.cjs && node scripts/build-holding-pages.cjs && node scripts/inject-signal-scorecards.cjs && node scripts/inject-agent-intelligence.cjs && node scripts/inject-chart-cognition.cjs && node scripts/build-chart-cognition-live.cjs && node scripts/build-static-home.cjs && node scripts/inject-portfolio-scoreboard.cjs && node scripts/inject-action-proximity-home.cjs && node scripts/generate-strategy-interpretations.cjs && node scripts/inject-strategy-cards-home.cjs && node scripts/inject-proportion-tuning.cjs && node scripts/validate-analytics-surface.cjs && node scripts/validate-agent-intelligence.cjs && node scripts/validate-chart-cognition.cjs && node scripts/validate-strategy-cards.cjs && node scripts/validate-strategy-interpretations.cjs && node scripts/validate-proportion-tuning.cjs && node scripts/inject-build-version.cjs && node scripts/strip-home-runtime.cjs && node scripts/build-vercel.cjs && node scripts/copy-agent-assets-to-public.cjs
